query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `worker_bank_accounts` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `worker_id` int NOT NULL,
  `account_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `bank_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `routing_number` varchar(9) NOT NULL,
  `account_number` varchar(17) NOT NULL,
  `account_type` enum('checking','savings') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'checking',
  `deposit_type` enum('full','fixed','percentage') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'full',
  `deposit_amount` decimal(18,2),
  `priority` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `is_active` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `is_primary` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `verified_at` timestamp,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `worker_bank_accounts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ach_batches` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `batch_number` varchar(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `payroll_period_id` int,
  `company_name` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
  `company_id` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `total_credits` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `total_debits` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `entry_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `effective_date` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `file_created_at` timestamp,
  `status` enum('draft','generated','submitted','accepted','rejected','processed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `file_name` varchar(255),
  `file_url` text,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `ach_batches_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ach_entries` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `batch_id` int NOT NULL,
  `payroll_run_id` int,
  `worker_id` int NOT NULL,
  `bank_account_id` int NOT NULL,
  `transaction_code` varchar(2) NOT NULL,
  `routing_number` varchar(9) NOT NULL,
  `account_number` varchar(17) NOT NULL,
  `amount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL,
  `individual_id` varchar(15) NOT NULL,
  `individual_name` varchar(22) NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','included','returned','settled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `return_code` varchar(3),
  `return_reason` text,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `ach_entries_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ach_batches` (

  `status` enum('draft','generated','submitted','accepted','rejected','processed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `file_name` varchar(255),
  `file_url` text,

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ach_entries` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `batch_id` int NOT NULL,

  `status` enum('pending','included','returned','settled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `return_code` varchar(3),
  `return_reason` text,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `ach_entries_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
